rule_name: India PPF — Public Provident Fund Rates
scope: Resident Indian individuals. One account per person (except for minors). Non-residents and NRIs cannot open new accounts; existing accounts continue until maturity.
source_name: Department of Economic Affairs, Ministry of Finance, Government of India
notes: Rate of 7.1% p.a. confirmed for Q1 FY 2026-27 (Apr-Jun 2026) per DEA notification dated 30-Mar-2026. Rate unchanged since April 2020 (was 7.9% before that). Review on 1 July 2026 for Q2 FY 2026-27 rate. Interest compounded annually, credited on 31 March. Tax-free — EEE status (Exempt at contribution, Exempt on interest, Exempt on maturity).

contribution_limits.frequency: up to 12 deposits per financial year

rate_history.period: FY 2019-20 Q4 onwards to FY 2026-27 Q1
